pr-evidence/harden-openai-benchmark-conf.why: V1 AWS g5 quality/latency benchmark runs should reject ambiguous bool-as-int fields, non-finite timings/sampling parameters, malformed dataset path maps, and non-JSON request-body/header overrides before issuing server requests.
